headline: Last dry window today — act before Sunday storms
weather_notes: Today's 64°F sunny window is the last clear opportunity before Saturday night's 70% thunderstorms begin.
Sunday brings 100% rain (0.25–0.5 in.) — any Bt applied after today won't survive through the storm.
Friday night low 37°F poses no frost risk to peas or garlic.
Skip watering today; Sunday's heavy rain will saturate beds through the weekend.

surfaced_tasks.title: Check hardneck garlic for scapes
surfaced_tasks.reason: Due Saturday and storms hit Saturday night — check and snap scapes today before rain begins.

surfaced_tasks.title: Inspect for aphids — apply Bt if caterpillars present
surfaced_tasks.reason: Peas are 9 days from expected harvest and Sunday's 100% rain will wash off any Bt — today is the last effective treatment window.
